education_normalized.university: Universidad Politécnica de Madrid, ETSIA Madrid, Spain

work_experience_normalized.position: Full-time Junior Consultant at Airbus DS E DOA Surveillance Activities
work_experience_normalized.description: Suppliers: L&M, Airbus Derivatives and A400M programme. Meetings with suppliers and Airbus DS Design Office. Analysis of technical documents and deliverables provided by the suppliers in coordination with Airbus DS Design Office (PTS, qualification documents, concessions, vendor service bulletins, etc). Local delegated administrator for SAP PAC tool. Management of A400M Concessions and Design Query Notes. Airbust DS DOA Independent Monitoring.

Support to the head of DOA independent monitoring in the management of the DOA school. Improvement projects aimed at increasing the robustness of the design assurance system. Responsible for managing the DOA suppliers database and DOA independent monitoring website.

international_experience_normalized.description: Living and studying in different cities such as Madrid (Spain), London (UK, 3 months), and Lisbon (Portugal, 1 year).

soft_skills: Capable to assume important responsibilities and get involved to achieve common objectives
